Package uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part

package uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part
Provides base classes and factories for rendering individual parts of an ASI message. This package defines the architectural foundation for multi-modal part rendering, supporting specialized displays for text, blobs, and tool-related data.
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message
    Contains UI components for rendering different types of messages in the conversation.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.text
    Provides specialized renderers for different segments of a text message part.
    uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi.message.part.tool
    Provides UI components for rendering tool-related message parts.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    AbstractPartPanel<T extends AbstractPart>
    The abstract base class for rendering AbstractPart instances in a diff-based UI component.
    BlobPartPanel
    Renders a BlobPart into a JComponent, handling images, audio, and file information.
    ModelCodeExecutionCallPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering HostedCodeExecutionCallPart instances.
    ModelCodeExecutionResultPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering HostedCodeExecutionResultPart instances.
    ModelSearchCallPartPanel
    A specialized panel for rendering WebSearchCallPart instances.
    PartPanelFactory
    A factory for creating AbstractPartPanel instances based on the concrete type of the AbstractPart.
    TextPartPanel
    Renders a TextPart into a list of JComponents, handling markdown and code block rendering.
